note: Community events board, edit freely. Inspired by Fred's garden patio & neighbourhood vibe from Google/Instagram.

events.title: Sunday Garden Brunch
events.description: Allpress coffee, warm sausage rolls and cakes in the back garden, the suntrap neighbours rave about.

events.title: Little Makers Morning
events.description: Buggy-friendly craft hour for little SE4 neighbours. Grab a flat white while the kids make.

events.title: Good & Proper Matcha Tasting
events.description: From Instagram to the cup, whisk, pour and taste our matcha latte and Matcha Spritz.

events.title: SE4 Book Swap
events.description: Bring a book, take a book. Soft jazz, cake, free Wi-Fi and community chat in the garden.

events.title: Garden Open Mic
events.description: Acoustic sets and spoken word from Crofton Park & Brockley. Sign up on the day or DM @fredslondon.

events.title: Regulars' Morning Meet
events.description: Coffee for the early crew, loyalty card punch, laptop Wi-Fi, and a wave to the neighbours.
